title: Billy Hatcher and the Giant Egg Gameplay Map

subject.name: Billy Hatcher and the Giant Egg

narrative.description: Sonic Team's GameCube platformer centers on rolling and hatching eggs for combat and puzzle solutions.
narrative.core_loop: Roll eggs to gain size and power, hatch helpers, and defeat Dark Raven across Morning Land.

mechanics.map_notes: Core egg roll puzzle platforming defines Billy Hatcher and the Giant Egg stage design.
mechanics.expression: Core egg roll puzzle platforming defines Billy Hatcher and the Giant Egg stage design.

mechanics.map_notes: Billy Hatcher and the Giant Egg uses collectathon token gating for world structure.
